updates.tweet_text: @david_pete57229 Its not that they always have control (though in ES they do 75% of the time and even in downtrends ES spends very little time actually going down) but just that as a day trader there's opportunities on the long every single day regardless of up or downtrend
updates.notes: Pure conversational/educational reply about day trading philosophy. No prices mentioned, no actionable levels named.

updates.tweet_text: @GabCrish If your using tradingview you can goto object window, highlight them all, right click, goto settings, click displacement, then put +63 which will move all the lines up 63 points since Sept is 63 points above June
updates.notes: Reply explaining TradingView displacement technique for contract rollover; no actionable price level named.

updates.tweet_text: The hardest part of trading isnt trading, its waiting. The market will present at least 1 high win rate, planned, A+ setup daily. But you have to wait for it, and not take all the 50/50 boredom trades that will eat the profit from the A+ trade before it even hits. Less=more
updates.notes: Pure trading philosophy/mindset commentary. No prices mentioned, no actionable levels named.

updates.tweet_text:
Huge follow through in #ES_F: Last Wednesday we got long on the 7311 Failed Breakdown. All week, I had one target I repeated 5x times daily: 7590. We finally hit last eve, for +279 points.

Plan today: Work done, ride runner. 7611, 7620, 7639 bonus. 7590, 7570=micro supports https://t.co/lKiQdxpBbb
updates.notes: All prices (7311, 7590, 7611, 7639, 7570) are morning-plan levels or hindsight references. 7620 appears in a directional list of existing targets, no new naming language.

updates.tweet_text: NOTE: ES is rolling over from June 2026 front month (ESM2026) to September front month contract (ESU2026).  These levels are now all September. June will expire Friday June 19th and stop trading completely but as the week goes on volume will transfer to September
updates.notes: Tweet is a contract rollover administrative notice (June→September ESU2026). No actionable price levels named; purely informational.
